tasks.description: Ink & Insomnia is the personal blog of Mara Solène, a late-night writer documenting her thoughts on literature, solitude, and city life in Montreal.

Ironclad Futures Summit is a three-day conference on industrial resilience and supply-chain innovation held annually in Pittsburgh, PA, targeting operations directors, logistics engineers, and policy makers.

FerroFlux Systems is a fictional industrial IoT middleware platform; this documentation site covers its Rust-based SDK, REST API, configuration DSL, and troubleshooting workflows for embedded sensor networks.

Ironbark Supply Co. is an Australian-themed outdoor and bushcraft goods store selling axes, fire-starters, canvas bags, and field tools via a dense catalog with sidebar filtering and full cart management.
Luminos is an AI writing copilot for product teams that turns messy Notion docs and Jira tickets into polished release notes, changelogs, and customer emails in seconds.

Obsidian Cove Retreat is a fictional clifftop resort on the Aegean coast offering 24 private suites, a sea-cave dining grotto, and curated coastal experiences — presented through a visually rich dark-luxury website.

Obsidian Fold is a contemporary print-art gallery in Rotterdam specializing in large-format risograph and letterpress works, with this five-page site serving as both exhibition catalogue and institutional voice.

Ironclad Maritime Registry is a dense government-style portal for commercial vessel operators to register ships, certify crew, file voyage manifests, submit compliance audits, and review fee schedules — all forms paired with live data tables.

Deep Current is an interactive infographic site presenting peer-reviewed ocean health data through dense SVG charts, illustrated cross-sections, and multi-column data layouts aimed at climate researchers and educators.

Folio Obscura is a quarterly design criticism magazine obsessed with the hidden logic of visual systems — covering typefaces, industrial objects, grid theory, and the archaeology of forgotten design movements.
